title: Scope D T-D2: wire loadActiveMeta into 4 engine read callers + extend PlanContextResult
description: Replace direct readAgentsMeta calls in 4 engine read paths with the appropriate loadActiveMeta variant: planContext → graceful (loadActiveMetaOrStale), getKnowledgeSections + getKnowledge + extractKnowledge → strict (loadActiveMeta). Extend PlanContextResult shape to surface auto_healed, previous_revision_hash, revision_hash so downstream CLI shim (T-D3) can render banner.

files.target: lines 54-69 PlanContextResult type + line 86-90 readAgentsMeta call
files.change: Extend `PlanContextResult` with optional fields `auto_healed?: boolean`, `previous_revision_hash?: string` (revision_hash field already exists). Replace `const meta = await readAgentsMeta(projectRoot);` at line 90 with `const metaResult = await loadActiveMetaOrStale(projectRoot, { caller: 'planContext' }); const meta = metaResult.meta;`. Populate result with `auto_healed: metaResult.auto_healed, previous_revision_hash: metaResult.previous_revision_hash` (only when auto_healed is true, otherwise omit for cleanliness).
Replace direct readAgentsMeta with `const { meta } = await loadActiveMeta(projectRoot, { caller: 'getKnowledgeSections' });`. Strict mode — id-based section lookup must be authoritative.
Replace with `const { meta } = await loadActiveMeta(projectRoot, { caller: 'getKnowledge' });`. Strict.

files.target: readAgentsMeta callsite(s) — counter is used here for id allocation
files.change: Replace with `const { meta } = await loadActiveMeta(projectRoot, { caller: 'extractKnowledge' });`. Strict — counter must be fresh for id allocation.

files.target: test coverage for new auto_healed surfacing
files.change: Add tests: (1) fresh meta → result.auto_healed undefined; (2) stale meta → result.auto_healed:true + previous_revision_hash present; (3) build failure → result.stale:true + meta still usable (graceful degradation).
Add test: stale meta → auto-heal triggers, getKnowledgeSections still returns expected sections (regression). Build failure → throws (strict semantics preserved).
Add test: stale meta + extractKnowledge → counter is from healed (fresh) meta, not stale on-disk (regression for id-allocation correctness).

implementation: Update plan-context.ts PlanContextResult type + readAgentsMeta callsite
Update knowledge-sections.ts, get-knowledge.ts, extract-knowledge.ts call sites (3 files, similar pattern)
Update 4 test files with the enumerated cases
Verify no consumer of readAgentsMeta still bypasses loadActiveMeta in the 4 listed engine paths (grep)

reference.pattern: Existing readAgentsMeta usage at plan-context.ts:90 + loadActiveMeta from T-D1
reference.examples: loadActiveMeta result destructure pattern: `const { meta } = await loadActiveMeta(...)` for strict callers

criteria: All 4 engine read paths route through loadActiveMeta or loadActiveMetaOrStale (verified by grep)
PlanContextResult exposes optional auto_healed + previous_revision_hash fields
Strict callers (sections/get/extract) throw on build failure; graceful caller (planContext) degrades
All 4 affected test files pass with new tests; no regression in upstream tests

rationale.chosen_approach: Per-caller variant selection — planContext graceful, others strict
alternatives_considered: All-graceful (loses authority guarantees on id-based lookups)
rationale.tradeoffs: Two variants increase API surface (mitigated by single-module export from T-D1)

manual_checks: Trigger a stale meta state, invoke planContext via MCP, confirm result carries auto_healed:true
success_metrics: No grep-detected residual direct readAgentsMeta in the 4 engine paths
